functions.name: get_aircraft_state
functions.description: Get live position, altitude, speed and heading for an aircraft by ICAO24 code.

functions.name: get_aircraft_track
functions.description: Get the historical flight track (waypoints) for an aircraft by ICAO24 code and time window.

functions.name: get_airport_arrivals
functions.description: Get flights that arrived at an airport on a given date (ICAO airport code, max 1 day, use yesterday's date).

functions.name: get_airport_departures
functions.description: Get flights that departed from an airport on a given date (ICAO airport code, max 1 day, today or earlier).

functions.name: get_flights_by_aircraft
functions.description: Get flight history for an aircraft by ICAO24 code and date range (max 2 days).
